raw.message: For those who dream of piloting their own Robot!

hook.summary: High-intensity mech combat featuring rapid-fire weaponry and an immediate 'KILL' reward.
hook.visual_action: A red and black mech fires twin machine guns at an enemy, resulting in an explosion and a 'KILL' notification.

scene_flow: Mech engages enemy with heavy machine guns in a city environment.
Enemy is destroyed, displaying a 'KILL' banner and announcer voice.
Player shifts fire to a new target while observing aerial combat.
Final screen displays 'INSTALL NOW!' with cinematic spark effects.
audience_proxy: Action-oriented male gamers interested in mecha combat and competitive shooters.
